use_cases: Displaying user profile pictures in navigation bars and headers
Showing avatars in comment sections and user lists
Representing users in notification panels and activity feeds
User identification in dashboards and admin interfaces
Profile display in social features and collaboration tools
ai_summary: A minimal avatar component built on Radix UI primitives with image and fallback support. Uses standard Tailwind classes for rounded-full styling and muted background colors. Part of the GitHub inline diff component set from 21st.dev, designed for displaying user profile information in developer-focused interfaces with clean, accessible markup.
